metadata.description: 常见异常类型: ValueError/TypeError/KeyError/IndexError/FileNotFoundError/AttributeError. Python code examples: 1. `ValueError`: ```python try: int("abc") except ValueError as e: print(e) ``` 2. `TypeError`: ```python try: 5 + "3" except TypeError as e: print(e) ``` 3. `KeyError`: ```python try: d = {"name": "Alice"} print(d["age"]) except KeyError as e: print(e) ``` 4. `IndexError`: ```python try: lst = [1, 2, 3] print(lst[5]) except IndexError as e: print(e) ``` 5. `FileNotFoundError`: ```python try: with open("non_existent_file.txt"): pass except FileNotFoundError as e: print(e) ``` 6. `AttributeError`: ```python try: 5.length except AttributeError as e: print(e) ```

data_pointers.title: 常见异常类型

Python code examples: 1. `ValueError`: ```python try: int("abc") except ValueError as e: print(e) ``` 2. `TypeError`: ```python try: 5 + "3" except TypeError as e: print(e) ``` 3. `KeyError`: ```python try: d = {"name": "Alice"} print(d["age"]) except KeyError as e: print(e) ``` 4. `IndexError`: ```python try: lst = [1, 2, 3] print(lst[5]) except IndexError as e: print(e) ``` 5. `FileNotFoundError`: ```python try: with open("non_existent_file.txt"): pass except FileNotFoundError as e: print(e) ``` 6. `AttributeError`: ```python try: 5.length except AttributeError as e: print(e) ```
